intent: Deliver one trustworthy daily fleet-state brief through Mission Control, with bounded outcomes, high-recall decisions, delivery proof, and conservative dry-run automation.
success_criteria: Existing and new suites pass; privacy and migration invariants hold; installed local UI and one authorized delivery are proven; a real runner dry-run is independently reviewed; implementation audit converges; five-morning verification remains explicitly separate until elapsed evidence exists.

steps.name: Resolve source plan and live ground truth
steps.action: Resolve the Fable transcript, approved plan, upgrade audit, repo contracts, current branch state, and exact runtime/repo claims.

steps.name: Capture clean Mission Control baseline
steps.action: Run every existing Mission Control gate before implementation and preserve the output as baseline evidence.

verify.command: bash scripts/chat-graph.test.sh && bash scripts/automation-status.test.sh && REPO_ROOT="$PWD" bash scripts/dashboard.test.sh --require-shell && node scripts/dashboard-render-smoke.js . && bash scripts/usage-snapshot.test.sh && bash scripts/scan-unfinished-work --self-test

steps.name: Create governed branch and OpenSpec contracts
steps.action: Create the isolated worktree/branch, branch ledger, strategic design, OpenSpec proposal/design/specs/tasks, and this HOTL binding.

steps.name: Lint the HOTL workflow
steps.action: Run the HOTL document linter and correct formatting, field, gate, or verification-contract errors.

steps.name: Capture T7 LaunchAgent failure evidence in the owning repo
steps.action: Re-verify exit 126, removable-media resolution, affected labels, log failure, and stable local runtime candidate without changing services.

steps.name: Repair systemic T7-backed LaunchAgent paths
steps.action: In an isolated third-party runtime branch, add a removable-media-path validator, point affected tracked plists at the stable local runtime, preserve intended loaded/unloaded states, rotate denial logs, and reinstall only intended labels.
steps.loop: until the owning repo tests and proportional live status checks pass

steps.name: Repair Morning Health and register stable evidence
steps.action: Add a bounded recent-log check, stable last-run marker, regression test, and Mission Control job registry row; prove the live job no longer exits 126 and its evidence becomes green.
steps.loop: until focused health and automation tests pass

steps.name: Repair improvement-loop false corrections
steps.action: Write failing Claude tool-result and Codex wrapper fixtures, filter provider-generated pseudo-user input, group digest identity before cap, quarantine proven false queue/lesson items, regenerate advisory output, and preserve real correction detection.

steps.name: Land eight branchless source cards
steps.action: On the third-party repo canonical main, create seven missing cards and update the existing Claude-Code-Agent-Monitor card with Morning Brief patterns; stage only owned hunks and run source-card closeout with export.

verify.command: bash -lc 'cd "/Users/gillettes/Coding Projects/3rd Party Git Hub Repo'"'"'s" && scripts/source-card-closeout --with-export'

steps.name: Write red privacy field-matrix tests
steps.action: Add synthetic tests covering narrative, actions, model prompts/tails, storage, errors, temporary files, argv, sidecars, and notification chunks; capture the expected pre-implementation failure.

steps.name: Implement the shared field-aware egress module
steps.action: Add the standard-library shared module and migrate current redaction callers while preserving narrative/action path semantics and non-content counters.
steps.loop: until the privacy field matrix passes

steps.name: Write red graph migration and provider-hygiene tests
steps.action: Add current-schema fixtures for node kinds, provider allowlist, repo-node preservation, kind-salted item keys, update/resolution evidence, row preservation, idempotence, and future-version refusal.

steps.name: Implement additive graph migration and node hygiene
steps.action: Extend chat-graph schema/migrations, derive node kind, keep repo nodes out of lineage, suppress raw unknown labels, and preserve all current rows/suppressions.

steps.name: Write red open-work change-stream tests
steps.action: Add tests for first/updated/resolved event timestamps, compound stable IDs, bounded new/resolved/aging export, text rewrites, same-text different-kind coexistence, and omission-not-resolution.

steps.name: Implement bounded open-work changes
steps.action: Add update/resolution evidence persistence and export a bounded `loose_end_changes` stream without changing the unresolved `loose_ends` compatibility contract.

steps.name: Write red distinct-run automation history tests
steps.action: Add repeated-poll, new-evidence, success-reset, stale/degraded, unknown, restart, concurrency, cap, keepalive episode, schedule, and glob-evidence fixtures.

steps.name: Implement distinct-run history and schedule math
steps.action: Persist locked atomic unique run events, history confidence, failure streaks, glob evidence, and injectable next-run estimates for both supported schedule forms.

steps.name: Render automation history
steps.action: Extend fixtures, feed, renderer, and smoke assertions for next run, streak, distinct-run strip, confidence, and copyable kickstart command.
steps.loop: until dashboard and render smoke pass

steps.name: Write red minimal Git-change and open-delta tests
steps.action: Add deterministic tests for the thin brief's minimal repo changes and open-work new/resolved/aging inputs without pulling in safe-runner eligibility yet.

steps.name: Implement thin-brief input contracts
steps.action: Extend scan/open-work exports only enough for honest deterministic repo changes and deltas; label missing/noisy data instead of inventing completeness.
steps.loop: until scan and graph tests pass

steps.name: Write red composer and sidecar tests
steps.action: Add tests for section order, structured sidecar, per-input cadence/freshness, first-run window, equal-timestamp compound cursor, event arrival during compose, preview non-advancement, top-N, and one-screen NEEDS YOU.

steps.name: Implement deterministic composer
steps.action: Add `scripts/morning-brief` producing atomic Markdown and latest.json from deterministic inputs with source-quality/trust labels and snapshot high-water marks.

steps.name: Add local CLI and dashboard brief feed
steps.action: Implement `dashboard brief --print`, brief feed collection, fixtures, and Home top section from latest.json without parsing Markdown.
steps.loop: until dashboard and render smoke pass

steps.name: Capture local thin-brief browser proof
steps.action: Install into an isolated runtime, collect deterministic feeds, render Home/Brief, and capture a nonblank browser artifact before adding model outcomes.
steps.loop: until the local UI proof is readable

verify.command: browser: file:///tmp/mission-control-morning-brief/index.html - Home shows a NEEDS-YOU-first Morning Brief summary with source freshness and no raw markdown parsing.
verify.check: Home shows a NEEDS-YOU-first Morning Brief summary with source freshness and no raw markdown parsing.

steps.name: Write red delivery receipt tests
steps.action: Add stub-send tests for fixed argv, chunk identity/hash, partial confirmation, retry-only-unconfirmed, completed no-op, failed-send cursor retention, and duplicate recognition.

steps.name: Implement resumable delivery status
steps.action: Add `--send`, fixed-argv mobile-connect use, line-bounded chunks, per-chunk receipts, atomic delivery state, cursor commit on complete success, and safe retry.

steps.name: Write red deadman tests
steps.action: Add missing/stale/empty/unsent/partial/throttled/token-leak and independent-path fixtures under a scrubbed launchd-like environment.

steps.name: Implement independent deadman and plists
steps.action: Add the minimal direct failure notifier, fully expanded 7:00/7:20 launchd templates, explicit HOME/PATH, throttling, job registry, and installer wiring.
steps.loop: until deadman, dashboard, and automation tests pass

verify.command: bash scripts/morning-brief-deadman.test.sh && bash scripts/automation-status.test.sh && REPO_ROOT="$PWD" bash scripts/dashboard.test.sh --require-shell

steps.name: Review privacy and external side effects before live proof
steps.action: Run a threat pass over transcript egress, notification payloads, tokens, temp files, logs, permissions, retries, idempotency, and rollback; close every blocking finding.
steps.loop: until no blocking privacy or delivery finding remains

verify.prompt: Review the actual diff and synthetic leakage evidence before first live cross-provider transcript egress or Telegram delivery.

steps.name: Perform one authorized manual delivery and deadman proof
steps.action: Use the existing authorized channel to send one manually invoked short brief, record receipt, then safely exercise the suppressed/failed delivery path without exposing tokens or waiting for wall-clock 7:20.
steps.loop: until receipt and failure-path evidence both exist

steps.name: Write red Tier 1 outcome fixtures
steps.action: Add synthetic real-shape Claude/Codex/audit/handoff/unstructured/late/unknown-provider fixtures and exact structured command/SHA anchoring assertions.

steps.name: Implement bounded Tier 1 outcome cards
steps.action: Parse bounded assistant tails into stable cards, classify handoffs honestly, preserve deterministic anchors, emit late updates, and never resolve on omission.

steps.name: Implement zero-call coverage planning
steps.action: Add seven-day provider/grammar/tail/eligibility/token projection with no model calls and modeled-cost labeling rather than claimed charges.
steps.loop: until coverage plan fixtures and no-call assertion pass

steps.name: Write red Tier 2 isolation tests
steps.action: Add cache, budget-zero, provider kill-switch, OAuth exit-75 defer, raw-tool exclusion, invented-command discard, and slow-model-vs-ingest concurrency tests.

steps.name: Review first live transcript egress
steps.action: Inspect the exact sanitized prompt, byte/message bounds, provider route, logging metadata, and temporary-file behavior before a bounded sample.
steps.loop: until the privacy reviewer accepts the bounded sample packet

verify.prompt: Confirm the sample contains no raw tool output or prohibited data and that per-provider kill switches work.

steps.name: Run bounded provider sample and set caps
steps.action: Sample a small number per provider, measure input/output tokens and latency, record quota impact, set caps from observed p95, and do not run broad backfill yet.
steps.loop: until calibration evidence and configured caps exist

steps.name: Implement isolated Tier 2 extraction
steps.action: Add separate locked extraction, closed-DB model calls, short WAL writes, content-hash cache, caps, OAuth defer, provider kills, health counters, and narrative-only model output.
steps.loop: until outcome, privacy, and concurrency suites pass

verify.command: bash scripts/chat-graph.test.sh && bash scripts/mission-control-common.test.sh && bash scripts/outcome-extractor.test.sh

steps.name: Write red decision-queue concurrency tests
steps.action: Add sync/alert/dismiss/restart/explicit-resolution/recurrence/duplicate-ingest tests with structured-vs-inferred trust behavior.

steps.name: Implement transactional decision queue and alerts
steps.action: Add SQLite WAL decision events, stable identities/fingerprints, explicit resolution, recurrence, fixed-argv alert receipts, dismiss CLI, feed, and pinned Home rows.
steps.loop: until decision and dashboard suites pass

verify.command: bash scripts/decision-alert.test.sh && REPO_ROOT="$PWD" bash scripts/dashboard.test.sh --require-shell && node scripts/dashboard-render-smoke.js .

steps.name: Enrich the working brief with outcomes and decisions
steps.action: Add Confirmed/Inferred outcome lines, lineage grouping only for valid chat nodes, flat unknown-provider cards, late updates, high-recall decisions, and deterministic anchors while preserving LLM-disabled fallback.
steps.loop: until integrated brief, graph, decision, and dashboard tests pass

verify.command: bash scripts/morning-brief.test.sh && bash scripts/chat-graph.test.sh && bash scripts/decision-alert.test.sh && node scripts/dashboard-render-smoke.js .

steps.name: Write red branch-level Git fact tests
steps.action: Add fixtures for local/upstream refs, named remote, ahead/behind, default/protected, worktrees, dirt, last commit/activity freshness, credential-bearing remote, and all refusal reasons.

steps.name: Implement structured branch facts
steps.action: Extend the scanner with sanitized branch-level facts, conservative eligibility, safe remote classification, and explicit refspec argv without leaking URLs.

steps.name: Write red safe-runner refusal tests
steps.action: Add DISABLE, default dry-run, checked-out, dirty, no upstream, behind/diverged, default/protected, recent/unknown activity, stale activity, credential remote, exact argv, log, and no-mutation tests.

steps.name: Implement default-dry-run safe runner
steps.action: Recompute facts immediately, implement only eligible explicit push proposals/open-end reconciliation/satisfied-todo detection, enforce hard prohibitions, and write permission-restricted exact before/after JSONL.

steps.name: Capture real live-ledger runner dry-run
steps.action: Run against the actual ledger in default dry-run, snapshot refs/worktrees before and after, and preserve every proposal/refusal for review.

steps.name: Independently review every runner proposal
steps.action: Have a separate Codex reviewer compare each dry-run action with live recomputed repo facts and confirm no state moved.
steps.loop: until all unsafe proposals are fixed or explicitly removed

verify.prompt: Review the real dry-run, live facts, and before/after ref snapshots; automatic push remains disabled regardless of result.

steps.name: Prove automatic push remains disabled
steps.action: Verify no installed plist or default flag can enable live push and the runner requires a later explicit activation decision outside this closeout.

steps.name: Run full cold verification
steps.action: Run every existing/new suite, Python compile, bash syntax, JSON validation, privacy scan, diff check, OpenSpec strict validation, and relevant global/third-party validators.
steps.loop: until all task-caused failures are fixed

verify.command: bash scripts/chat-graph.test.sh && bash scripts/automation-status.test.sh && REPO_ROOT="$PWD" bash scripts/dashboard.test.sh --require-shell && node scripts/dashboard-render-smoke.js . && bash scripts/usage-snapshot.test.sh && bash scripts/scan-unfinished-work --self-test && bash scripts/mission-control-common.test.sh && bash scripts/morning-brief.test.sh && bash scripts/morning-brief-deadman.test.sh && bash scripts/outcome-coverage.test.sh && bash scripts/outcome-extractor.test.sh && bash scripts/decision-alert.test.sh && bash scripts/loose-end-runner.test.sh && DO_NOT_TRACK=1 openspec validate morning-brief --strict && git diff --check

steps.name: Capture installed runtime and browser evidence
steps.action: Install the reviewed bundle, collect live feeds, run scrubbed-environment entrypoints, capture Home/Automation/Brief views, and document rollback.
steps.loop: until installed and browser evidence are nonblank and current

verify.command: browser: file:///Users/gillettes/.mission-control/index.html - Home and Automation show current Morning Brief, trust/freshness labels, and decision/job history surfaces without errors.
verify.check: Home and Automation show current Morning Brief, trust/freshness labels, and decision/job history surfaces without errors.

steps.name: Run self-audit and threat/ripple checks
steps.action: Compare implementation against every OpenSpec requirement, inspect privacy/security, migrations, side effects, scope, docs, runtime/install drift, manual burden, and rollback; convert findings into tests or durable dispositions.
steps.loop: until no blocking self-audit finding remains

steps.name: Run independent Codex implementation audit
steps.action: Give a separate Codex session the actual diff, specs, cold outputs, installed proof, and live dry-run; require enumerated findings or review-clean with residual risk.
steps.loop: until the reviewer returns a complete evidence-backed audit

steps.name: Implement audit findings and repeat
steps.action: Fix every accepted material finding with regression evidence and rerun independent review while severe novel issues remain plausible.
steps.loop: until review-clean or every residual is explicitly owned and deferred

steps.name: Refresh durable records and implemented state
steps.action: Update Mission Control Work/Test/Audit records, IMPROVEMENTS statuses, PROJECT_MEMORY, OpenSpec verify/retrospective, ER-107 lifecycle as implemented-pending-proof, branch ledger, and notification consolidation work item.

steps.name: Commit and push every owning repo outcome
steps.action: Inspect owned diffs, stage only task files, make conventional per-outcome commits in Mission Control/global/third-party runtime and branchless-card paths, push, and record SHAs without disturbing unrelated dirt.
steps.loop: until every task-edited file is committed and every push succeeds

steps.name: Close implementation with honest pending proof
steps.action: Report implemented code/runtime/audits, exact commits/pushes, live evidence, rollback, and the elapsed five-morning proof still required; do not mark the overall goal or ER-107 verified yet.

steps.name: Complete five-morning proof and final archive
steps.action: Over approximately five real mornings, record read/action/comprehension evidence, tune noise, decide subsume/keep/fold for each notification/report surface, rerun final independent audit, mark ER-107 verified, archive OpenSpec with Ripple/Completed-index updates, and close the overall goal.
steps.loop: until five qualifying mornings and final review-clean evidence exist

verify.prompt: Confirm five real morning records meet the 60-second comprehension and action criteria, consolidation decisions are durable, and final audit is review-clean.
